what_wasted_effort: Repeated manual truth-mapping across many reports; reusable context pack would reduce repetition.
Additional explicit scope checks needed because untracked files are invisible to plain git diff filters.
what_tools_were_missing: Reusable optimization-plan contract template generator (JSON+MD pair).
Shared evidence normalizer for runtime/source-map/asset reports.

whether_optimization_plan_generator_or_c.reason: Standardized planning artifacts reduce drift and speed future bounded optimization tasks.

next_gate_or_check_would_improve_kpd: Gate requiring slice-by-slice rollback evidence and truth-preservation checklist before any performance implementation verdict.
